heading: Goals for financial management and academic program
label: 1059b Goals for financial management and academic program
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1992 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1992section 2 of Pub. L. 102–325section 1001 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1992 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1992section 2 of Pub. L. 102–325section 1001 of this title

children.heading: Goals
children.label: a Goals
children.text: Any application for a grant under this part shall describe measurable goals for the institution’s financial management and academic programs, and include a plan of how the applicant intends to achieve those goals.

children.heading: Continuation requirements
children.label: b Continuation requirements
children.text: Any continuation application shall demonstrate the progress made toward achievement of the goals described pursuant to subsection (a).
